    let minTime = Infinity;

            let landEnd2 = landStart + landDuration[i];
            let time2 = landEnd2;
            
            let currentMin = Math.min(time1, time2);
            if (currentMin < minTime) {
                minTime = currentMin;
            }
        }
    }
    return minTime;
}
